modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Email not delivered to colleague in Outlook.

full_description_text:  
I tried to send an email to a coworker. It didn’t go through. I got an error saying the recipient's email system isn’t accepting messages. It also mentioned something about an unrecognized sender email address.
short_description: Email not delivered to colleague in Outlook.
description: I tried to send an email to a coworker. It didn’t go through. I got an error saying the recipient's email system isn’t accepting messages. It also mentioned something about an unrecognized sender email address.
